text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Fan Fest—an annual academy
event that's held especially for fans. However...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Fan A
text_block_list.text: Omigosh, look! It's Tamamo Cross! Tamamo Cross!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Fan B
text_block_list.text: You're right! I can't believe I'm seeing the Tamamo Cross! In real life!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: The Tamamo Cross?! Didja hear that?! They know who I am!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With her popularity continuing to climb, Tamamo
Cross's posse of devoted fans is growing larger
too.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Geez, what a racket...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Lemme be honest, Trainer. This whole "fan" thing
isn't clickin' with me...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I'm no celebrity. 'Sides, it's not like I'm runnin' to
make the fans happy.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
So how come they're all cheerin' me on? I don't
get it one bit...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross struggles to understand the fan
mentality.
choice_data_list: Why don't you ask the fans themselves?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Worth a shot, I guess. Lemme try callin' one
over...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you. I was wondering... What made you a fan
of me?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Fan C
text_block_list.text:
Well, you always go above and beyond for your
family, right?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Fan C
text_block_list.text:
You want the best for your mom, your dad, and
your siblings, too. That's a lot of people to be
shouldering with that small frame.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Huh?! How come ya know 'bout all that?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Fan C
text_block_list.text:
Well, your story's been in magazines and on the
internet, too. After learning all about you, I really
want to see you win!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Fan C
text_block_list.text: I want to see you happy, no matter what!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
R-really... Well, thanks a bunch. Ya sure know a
lot about me...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Anyways, what I'm hearin' is that you're
sympathetic. But at the end of the day, I'm still
just a stranger, yeah? So why...

text_block_list.name: Distant Scream
text_block_list.text: AAAAAHHHHH!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, what was that?! Sounds like it came from
the school buildin'. Da heck's goin' on?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We rush to the source of the shriek...

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: Oguriiii! Oguriiii!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's just a buncha groupies. What did you do
to set 'em all off, Oguri?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Nothing, I think. I was just walking by...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap! You burst outta the regionals and now
you're winning graded races one after another...
You're amazing!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Will you be entering the Satsuki Sho? What's next
for you?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
They're even makin' a huge fuss over a newbie
like Oguri...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Her only graded wins are two G3s... You're tellin'
me she's got fans this devoted already? Make it
make sense.

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: EEEEEK! OGURI!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Pant... Sure is gettin' wild out there.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I knew the Twinkle Series was big, but I didn't think it was this big...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I knew that more people came to see these
races than the regional ones, but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Twinkle Series is definitely popular, but the
passion surrounding Tamamo Cross and Oguri
Cap is another level.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After witnessing the fans' passion first-hand, I
can't help thinking...
choice_data_list: This could be the start of something.
This could be the start of something.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Huh? The start of... what?
choice_data_list: Of... a special moment in time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Between Tamamo Cross's family and Oguri Cap's
countryside background, both of them are
influenced by their roots.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like that's what their fans find so deeply
appealing—to the point that they're offering their
unwavering support.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
This is goin' over my head, but if the hype doesn't
die down... what are we gonna do?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
How are we gonna focus on races with fans
screeching and squealing like that? It's startin' to
freak me out...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry, Tama... Their cheers will give us
courage.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Fan support won't hold us back. In fact, it'll
awaken our dormant strength.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
That so? Well, considerin' how popular ya were in
the regionals, I'll take your word for it.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: C'mon, Trainer. Let's head back.
choice_data_list: Back to where the fans are?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. If they're gonna make us stronger, it's only
fair we give 'em some attention.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Get your game face on, Oguri. We're on different racin' tours, so I'll take my tour's fans and you take yours. There can't be that much overlap, right? Haha...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap doesn't respond... But moments later,
the two are chatting cheerily with their fans.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Where will this passion take us? Clouds like I've
never seen start to circle around us—a growing
vortex.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When the two return, there's an unusual request
waiting for them.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
The heck?! You want me 'n Oguri to host a talk
show?

text_block_list.name: Event Staff
text_block_list.text: Yes, we've had an abundance of requests.

text_block_list.name: Event Staff
text_block_list.text:
Apparently, people are very interested in hearing
a discussion between you both. I know this is all
very sudden, but how about it?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Geez. Guess there's no accountin' for taste, huh.
Trainer, ya think chattin' like we always do in our
room'll be interestin' enough for 'em?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Well, if you're on board, that's good enough for
me. C'mon, Oguri, we got a show to prep for.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so the hastily planned talk show kicks off...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Truth is, we don't need no alarm clock in our
room.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Every mornin', like clockwork, a certain
someone's tummy starts growlin' at breakfast
o'clock. That "Grrrr" is guaranteed.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Whoa... That's one incredible alarm.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Hey! This is your tummy I'm talkin' about here! I know you're da clock, but don't you start actin' cuckoo!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: Ahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Much to their fans' delight, they play off each
other seamlessly, and it's not long before their
discussion has turned into something of a comedy
routine.
